title: Cellar Waterlines
body: Flood marks in Pip's cellar run higher than last season's rain would explain. The surge comes from the north.

title: Levy Engineering
body: Kess's diagrams redirect thirty percent more flow south than the Charter allows.

title: Sunken Chapel Mural
body: Three species kneel at one river. A fourth figure is scratched out — Elder Thatch won't say who.

title: Ferry Depth Marks
body: Grizz's notches show water rising faster upstream since levy stone hauls began.

title: Marta's Label Chart
body: Red clay band = tonic. Green band = toxin. Pondwort swapped the bands on today's batch.

title: Council Vote
body: The Council of Shells heard your evidence on the north levy. Lilypond's fate is decided.

title: Ferry Toll Petition
body: Grizz will petition the council to separate levy haul fees from crossing tolls.

title: Tonic Mix Fixed
body: Pondwort relabeled the batch. Marta says check twice, croak once.

title: Evidence Gathered
body: Four sites examined. The flooding pattern doesn't match natural rain alone.
